title: StanPack
description: Stanpack: A Minecraft modpack enhancing visuals, performance, and multiplayer. Features top shaders, building tools, minimaps, and voice chat for an immersive experience. Perfect for builders, adventurers, and PvP players alike.
body:
# **The Ultimate Minecraft Experience**

Stanpack is a carefully curated modpack designed to elevate your Minecraft world! This pack combines performance improvements, visual upgrades, and useful tools to make your gameplay smoother, more beautiful, and more immersive. Whether you love building, exploring, or PvP, Stanpack has everything you need for an optimized Minecraft experience.

**Visual Enhancements and Realism**

With a combination of shaders like BSL, Complementary Shaders - Unbound, and Solas Shader, along with visual tweaks like Clear Glass Pack and 3D Skin Layers, Stanpack delivers an unmatched sense of realism. 3D Ladders and Continuity add depth to small details, making your builds look better than ever.

**Improved Performance**

Stanpack includes performance-boosting mods like Sodium and Lithium, allowing Minecraft to run smoothly even in high-demand environments. Paired with Fabric API and Indium, it ensures a stable, seamless experience with minimal lag and maximum FPS.

**Handy Tools and User-Friendly Interface**

With mods like Just Enough Items (JEI) and Jade, you get easy access to crafting recipes and block information. FancyMenu and Shrimp’s Immersive Interfaces give your interface a sleek look and make it easy to use, while Mouse Tweaks enhances standard mouse controls. Ok Zoomer provides flexible zoom, perfect for getting a closer look at details.

**Enhanced Building Capabilities**

For the creative builders, Litematica and MaLiLib are included, ideal for making blueprints and complex structures. These mods are designed to make building projects more efficient, giving you better control and precision.

**Multiplayer and Social Features**

Communicate effortlessly with others through Simple Voice Chat and Replay Voice Chat. ReplayMod lets you relive and record epic moments, so you can share your adventures with others. For explorers, Xaero’s Minimap and Xaero’s World Map are available, making world navigation simpler so you’ll never get lost again.


**With Stanpack, experience Minecraft like never before, in both singleplayer and multiplayer. Enhance your gameplay, explore new areas, build like a pro, and play smoothly without lag. Try Stanpack today and discover a world of possibilities!**
